title: PraxecToolDescriptor
description: v0.0.17 tool-source ecosystem contract (D1). A descriptor is a manifest over existing primitives: `reach.connection` is a LITERAL gateway `connections:` entry (copy, never transform), `reach.grant_as` names the bare token the operator must add to `grant_connections:` (the descriptor never grants), and `provision` mirrors the ADR-0013 packs/v2 provider chain. Auth is declared by NAME only — never secret values.

source_repo.description: Git URL / registry coordinate of origin.

kind.description: Closed discriminator — exhaustive `match` in Rust (ToolKind). Adding a kind is a deliberate schema amendment. Must match reach.connection.kind (TOOL_KIND_MISMATCH otherwise).

suggested_workflows.description: Workflow definitionIds (namespace-qualified) that compose this tool.

embedding.description: Reserved v0.0.18 forward-compat attachment point (tool-description embeddings). Never required.

structural_fingerprint.description: Reserved v0.0.18 forward-compat attachment point (structural dedup). Never required.

connection_name.description: The `connections:` key this tool's operations reference.

grant_as.description: Bare pack-local name the operator writes in `grant_connections:`. Declaring it never grants — activation stays an operator act (SPEC §9.5 grant gate).

connection.description: The LITERAL connections entry, copied verbatim into /connections on install. Same $ref the gateway config already validates; kind here MUST match the top-level kind.

env.description: Env var NAMES the tool needs. Never secret values — those enter only via `px connections add` (D4a).

headers.description: Header NAMES the tool needs. Never secret values.

providers.description: Ordered provider chain, first-available wins (mirrors packs/v2; doctor offers with consent, never auto-installs).

verb.description: Closed ScriptVerb vocabulary (SPEC §22.3) — no parallel taxonomy.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the operation's arguments.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for the operation's result.

mcp_tool.description: kind: mcp dispatch coordinate — the remote tool name.
